Detected Solution Path

This path is reconstructed from structured quest fields, linked locations, targets, and the mission text.

  1. Collect 15 Big Metal Scrap and recycle it at the requested station.
  2. Some exact counts or destination names still come from placeholder text in the client cache, so the narrative text remains important.

Quest Text

Description

Shooting stuff down is all fun and games, but we also need to keep it real and clean. It's time you show us some responsibility and recycle [amount] units of Big Metal Scrap.

Completion

No completion text was exposed for this quest.

This quest still contains placeholder markers in the client cache, so some counts or location names may only be partially resolved automatically.
